slides.title: Build a balanced plate *without counting*.
slides.sub: No app, no scale. Just your hand and a simple rule that works anywhere.

slides.title: A palm of protein
slides.body: Start with a *palm-sized* portion of protein at every meal. Build the plate around it.

slides.title: Fill half the plate
slides.body: Pile on *vegetables* — half the plate. Volume, fiber, and almost no calories.

slides.title: A cupped hand of carbs
slides.body: Rice, potatoes, pasta — about a *cupped handful*. Enough to fuel, not flood.

slides.title: A thumb of fats
slides.body: Oils, nuts and cheese add up fast. A *thumb-sized* portion keeps them in check.

slides.title: Scale to your goal
slides.body: Losing fat? *Smaller carbs, more veg.* Building? Add a second carb. Same simple plate.

slides.title: Eyeball it. *Nail it.*
slides.body: Snap your plate and Vibe Health estimates the portions — so you can check your eye against the numbers over time.

caption:
You don't need a food scale to eat well — you need your hand. ✋

Palm of protein, half a plate of veg, a cupped hand of carbs, a thumb of fats. Save this and build every plate by eye. 🔖

Snap a plate and Vibe Health checks your portions for you → link in bio.
youtube_title: Build a Balanced Plate Without Counting Calories
